from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Response
import time

app = FastAPI()

@app.middleware("http")
async def add_process_time_header(request: Request, call_next):
    start_time = time.time()
    print(f"[{time.ctime()}] Incoming request: {request.method} {request.url}")

    response = await call_next(request)

    process_time = time.time() - start_time
    response.headers["X-Process-Time"] = str(process_time)
    print(f"[{time.ctime()}] Outgoing response: Status {response.status_code}, Process Time: {process_time:.4f}s")
    return response

@app.get("/")
async def read_root():
    return {"message": "Hello from FastAPI!"}

@app.get("/items/{item_id}")
async def read_item(item_id: int):
    return {"item_id": item_id, "message": f"This is item {item_id}"}

# To run this application:
# 1. Save the code as main.py (or any other name).
# 2. Run from your terminal: uvicorn main:app --reload
# 3. Open your browser or use curl to access:
#    - http://127.0.0.1:8000/
#    - http://127.0.0.1:8000/items/5
# You will see the request and response logs in your terminal.
